/CAL:TO SET APD MTR PRCS/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT'S ACM REQUIREMENT OF A GPS DEVICE FOR ELECTRONIC MONITORING IS HEREBY REMOVED/CONTD:TO SET APD MTRPRCS ON 05-27-20/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET APD PRCS (3455), TO BE HEARD WITH 2509993/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THESFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXTBUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:SHILO PIERCE/SA2:INTERSECTION OF 21ST ST & BRYANT ST, SF CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONT/DOP/
/X:JUDGE FLEMING APPEARS VIA ZOOM/CTORD:PRCS IS REINSTATED ORIGINAL TERMSAND CONDITIONS WITH SAME END DATE/
